title: Command Map Solo Fill
summary: Adjusted solo map reset zoom, added an animated grid underlay, and boosted route glow so the Map teleport opens a denser game-like atlas surface.
proof: Changed map reset fitting so the Command Map stage uses a stronger solo-stage zoom floor and cap.
Added a scoped animated grid underlay, world drop shadow, and route glow only while the Command Map stage is active.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the solo-fill unlock.
